title: Utility functions for stripping, counting, and downloading annotation markers from markdown content
purpose: Provides functions to remove annotation markers from markdown, count different types of annotations, and download cleaned content as a file.

steps.content: Initialize the result with the input content.
For each annotation pattern, remove all matches from the result.
Collapse sequences of three or more blank lines into double line breaks.
Trim leading and trailing whitespace from the final result.

methods.name: countAnnotations
methods.normalized_params: (content: string): { comment: number; propose: number; approve: number; reject: number }

steps.content: Initialize counts for each annotation type to zero.
Count comment-related markers in the content.
Count propose-related markers in the content.
Count approve-related markers in the content.
Count reject-related markers in the content.
Return the object containing all annotation counts.
Strip all annotation markers from the input content.
Create a blob from the cleaned content with markdown MIME type.
Generate a URL for the blob.
Create a temporary download link element.
Set the link's href to the blob URL and download filename.
Trigger the download by clicking the link.
Revoke the blob URL to free memory.
